initial_program:
present(C) :- input(R, C, Color), true.

minRow(C) = #min{R : input(R, _, C)}.
maxRow(C) = #max{R : input(R, _, C)}.

0 { C1 : present(C1) } 1 :- true.

eligible(C2, C1) :- present(C2), C2 != C1, minRow(C2) > maxRow(C1).

0 { C2 : eligible(C2, C1) } 1 :- true.

selected(C1, C2) :- true.

output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), selected(C1, C2), (V = C1).
output(R, C, V) :- input(R, C, V), selected(C1, C2), (V = C2).

#show output/3.
